metadata.title: OneHealth DataSpace: Training in Data Spaces and the One Health Approach
metadata.description: Courses and workshops to learn what data spaces are and how to apply the One Health approach to data. Train with OneHealth DataSpace.

intro.title: Training in Data Spaces and One Health
intro.paragraph1: At OneHealth DataSpace we run courses and workshops to learn what data spaces are, how they work, and how the One Health approach —the integration of human, animal, and environmental health— applies to data sharing and management.
intro.paragraph2: Our training offering is aimed both at those who are approaching these technologies for the first time and at professionals working in the One Health field.
intro.paragraph3: The project partners also provide dedicated tutorials that address practical questions about using the platform, from the first steps to its advanced features, and showcase the results that can be achieved with the OneHealth DataSpace ecosystem.

cta.text: Check out our training events and reserve your spot
